bark_5395dfa49572ed16.text: Leave the mage. Kill the others.
bark_5395dfa49572ed16.speaker: Renraku Security

bark_1f1913b3cebebfc0.text: This is bad. They have a shaman.
bark_1f1913b3cebebfc0.speaker: Sangoma

bark_ee158a513d5c1edd.text: I’m here about the new Ripper vic, Sam Watts.
bark_ee158a513d5c1edd.speaker: McKlusky

bark_96dcaf9f19dfe6dc.text: We can leave whenever you're ready.
bark_96dcaf9f19dfe6dc.speaker: Jake Armitage

bark_f93ddce1dcffa657.text: My stash is just around the corner, in the alley.
bark_f93ddce1dcffa657.speaker: Unknown

bark_061d2fe6836a0d22.text: Looking for a date? $+(l.race_plural) are my favorite...
bark_061d2fe6836a0d22.speaker: Hooker

bark_b568775b92e0b6ee.text: This is... *hic* the BEST place... *hic* to party.
bark_b568775b92e0b6ee.speaker: NPC15

bark_f3372c23e5b66cc9.text: But we barely have anything left!
bark_f3372c23e5b66cc9.speaker: Mrs. James

bark_af43460bbd1dd5e8.text: Not my problem. Pay up by morning or else.
bark_af43460bbd1dd5e8.speaker: Head Thug

bark_e8c97ff6c5a39764.text: That’s not how Coyote does it.
bark_e8c97ff6c5a39764.speaker: Guest01

bark_3c9884cdca656bbc.text: Do you have a love potion?
bark_3c9884cdca656bbc.speaker: Guest07

bark_be2b3bd4e91569ab.text: Hey, seen my friend around? Tall lady, dreads...
bark_be2b3bd4e91569ab.speaker: Paco

bark_594f5264cb053c9c.text: I’ve seen her at the Shack!
bark_594f5264cb053c9c.speaker: Spectator04

bark_46372d60d815e5f2.text: It’s a Corp hit I’m sure.
bark_46372d60d815e5f2.speaker: Spectator05

bark_dff861a4078d90b0.text: I think I'm going to be sick...
bark_dff861a4078d90b0.speaker: Spectator03

bark_d1d3c0c5faa3245f.text: Join us and change the world!
bark_d1d3c0c5faa3245f.speaker: NPC1

bark_658cdd88a5aca2e7.text: Synthjuice for sale! Just fabbed today!
bark_658cdd88a5aca2e7.speaker: NPC4

bark_377c158791e4145d.text: I got dog on a stick here!
bark_377c158791e4145d.speaker: NPC5

bark_f010f2a970b38dd0.text: Glad there's no trolls around here...
bark_f010f2a970b38dd0.speaker: NPC17

bark_b1b28346bd80788a.text: Hey, what are you doing here?
bark_b1b28346bd80788a.speaker: Sad Old Woman

bark_b78ae0cb2b8b123f.text: You find a piece of paper with some numbers on it.
bark_b78ae0cb2b8b123f.speaker: Narrator

bark_c50ac476ad349c21.text: The drone would be out of range if it went upstairs.
bark_c50ac476ad349c21.speaker: Narrator

bark_29e6792d0e385d24.text: The spirit would break your control if it went upstairs.
bark_29e6792d0e385d24.speaker: Narrator

bark_ea222ec1677bf984.text: Coyote sways woozily, standing through sheer force of will.
bark_ea222ec1677bf984.speaker: Coyote

bark_05f9220e6eb2044b.text: That'll keep her happy. Now move quick.
bark_05f9220e6eb2044b.speaker: Tranq

bark_74274938b46e811f.text: Stand back... Chile here has a wicked hot temper.
bark_74274938b46e811f.speaker: Tranq

bark_64876d44f6013d51.text: Finally! I'll be along in a minute.
bark_64876d44f6013d51.speaker: Stevie J

bark_21e669221eb11818.text: Hey! What are you doing up here!?!
bark_21e669221eb11818.speaker: Unknown

bark_0464c4d26faecbd3.text: We're under attack boys, get the big guns!
bark_0464c4d26faecbd3.speaker: Stevie J

bark_bb731e08cf914a58.text: What the hell do you think you're doing?!?
bark_bb731e08cf914a58.speaker: Krund

bark_d09455783b4f21a1.text: Okay, time for us to bolt.
bark_d09455783b4f21a1.speaker: Unknown

bark_718f0761c63d8136.text: That's a... big gun you have there.
bark_718f0761c63d8136.speaker: Streetwalker

bark_81acf15988d1d64a.text: The lock panel easily comes unscrewed.
bark_81acf15988d1d64a.speaker: Narrator

bark_c4cd7c3a12a4a4c4.text: Alright everybody, let's go. Wrap it up.
bark_c4cd7c3a12a4a4c4.speaker: Officer Aguirre

bark_760743c2d360a15f.text: Busy right now, $(l.name). Talk to Aguirre.
bark_760743c2d360a15f.speaker: Dresden

bark_5da3023c69e31478.text: You let that $(l.guy) in to a crime scene again, I'm calling internal affairs.
bark_5da3023c69e31478.speaker: McKlusky

bark_576c0462c9adde0b.text: Internal affairs? I'm sure they'd love to talk to you.
bark_576c0462c9adde0b.speaker: Officer Aguirre

bark_bb3b6a5f4f14d661.text: What's on special for happy hour?
bark_bb3b6a5f4f14d661.speaker: ElfRigger

bark_bb9999c8f1074a92.text: Hey, it's those guys who took out Stevie J's place. Get 'em!
bark_bb9999c8f1074a92.speaker: BTL Security

bark_64a60013318008a3.text: Looks like Charlie didn't handle things... get 'em!
bark_64a60013318008a3.speaker: BTL Operator

bark_22a7b7dba973c10e.text: Ha ha, there we go. Dance for me!
bark_22a7b7dba973c10e.speaker: Yakuza Decker

bark_ce9ffcf53d78088b.text: They've turned these addicts into killing puppets. Don't hurt them, they don't know what they're doing!
bark_ce9ffcf53d78088b.speaker: Coyote

bark_8e4912334331c395.text: Heh, heh, that's right. Take that!
bark_8e4912334331c395.speaker: Yakuza Decker

bark_f3a243a7b852e302.text: Looks like it's the key to the warehouse.
bark_f3a243a7b852e302.speaker: Narrator

bark_a2086e8dccb2c9f2.text: Fan out and secure the area!
bark_a2086e8dccb2c9f2.speaker: Shadowrunner

bark_5f603715298ee65f.text: Find that data or we're dead meat!
bark_5f603715298ee65f.speaker: Shadowrunner

bark_3704d8b946ab86f5.text: We need to get rid of these guys before we can summon the spirit.
bark_3704d8b946ab86f5.speaker: Unknown

bark_2b2b6607e7bd9d99.text: That's the last one. Follow me!
bark_2b2b6607e7bd9d99.speaker: Unknown

bark_e77c49eaa47b13bf.text: I will now summon the spirit.
bark_e77c49eaa47b13bf.speaker: Unknown

bark_13422faa0a4aa1ca.text: We were here first, assholes! This is OUR score.
bark_13422faa0a4aa1ca.speaker: Shadowrunner

bark_84c6948f89194403.text: Mrs. Kubota is in the back.
bark_84c6948f89194403.speaker: Janitor

bark_e69591149f03f475.text: 100% match to a ... dead man? Let's keep looking.
bark_e69591149f03f475.speaker: Johnny Clean

bark_b8d79ea620278196.text: I've got two more hits on the name Silas Forsberg.
bark_b8d79ea620278196.speaker: Johnny Clean

bark_9eac78b1891981b1.text: Now that might be something we can go on. Let's regroup in meat space for a bit.
bark_9eac78b1891981b1.speaker: Johnny Clean

bark_81784b84b904a684.text: Got a name now - Dr. Holmes? Let's keep going and find out where he works.
bark_81784b84b904a684.speaker: Johnny Clean

bark_56177da97c7c2608.text: That arch will take us to the next node.
bark_56177da97c7c2608.speaker: Johnny Clean

bark_14f2475f21080f9e.text: The data store ahead is defended by intrusion countermeasures.
bark_14f2475f21080f9e.speaker: Johnny Clean

bark_c5a596e6063ad09a.text: Watch out! That black IC could fry our brains and kill us!
bark_c5a596e6063ad09a.speaker: Johnny Clean

bark_5c9fd308ac62800e.text: The IC is down. Let's see if there's a match for this fingerprint.
bark_5c9fd308ac62800e.speaker: Johnny Clean

bark_dec74b41776b333b.text: There's a cockroach in my eggs!
bark_dec74b41776b333b.speaker: Runner

bark_a56cce3a9267cd49.text: He will be with you in a moment.
bark_a56cce3a9267cd49.speaker: Receptionist

bark_4bf7b5cee1dc687d.text: Sure, when are you on break?
bark_4bf7b5cee1dc687d.speaker: Hospital Guard

bark_dd37375b93b15bda.text: Who opened the cells? They'll kill us all!
bark_dd37375b93b15bda.speaker: Hospital Security

bark_4672b1ba52b972bf.text: The surgical cart contains a gate key.
bark_4672b1ba52b972bf.speaker: Narrator

bark_6a7d649c5f802c3a.text: There's an unlabeled trivid disc in the second drawer.
bark_6a7d649c5f802c3a.speaker: Unknown

bark_4fd931174dad05b1.text: Can't you do anything right, Pitezel?
bark_4fd931174dad05b1.speaker: Dr. Holmes

bark_52c1c0a4c6251183.text: Halt! This is a restricted area!
bark_52c1c0a4c6251183.speaker: Lonestar Guard

bark_ddfd26a541347da6.text: Call the Response Center! We need reinforcements!
bark_ddfd26a541347da6.speaker: Lonestar Mage

bark_3fe07dee5d5de07a.text: That's some serious hardware... let's see if we can go around 'em.
bark_3fe07dee5d5de07a.speaker: Unknown

bark_aa9bc8508ddca3fb.text: You place the cables and data chips around the terminal's casing.
bark_aa9bc8508ddca3fb.speaker: Narrator

bark_21e2742c2b111273.text: A basilisk? Why did it have to be a basilisk?
bark_21e2742c2b111273.speaker: Narrator

bark_d90e96fc8b6e430f.text: Ma'am, we received your code red!
bark_d90e96fc8b6e430f.speaker: Unknown

bark_57782d229ddb52dc.text: You heard the boss, get it done.
bark_57782d229ddb52dc.speaker: Narrator

bark_56e1babe1de0dd39.text: Damn SINless people making more work for me!
bark_56e1babe1de0dd39.speaker: Cook

bark_ad429e3692acbd9d.text: You can be more than human.
bark_ad429e3692acbd9d.speaker: UBC4

bark_bdf7610a4d7c56d5.text: I already paid my surgeon to be so.
bark_bdf7610a4d7c56d5.speaker: C3

bark_58ece203aa855e93.text: Your past is irrelevant, it’s your future that counts.
bark_58ece203aa855e93.speaker: UBC 5

bark_257671a3a0f8c770.text: It sure is cold out here...
bark_257671a3a0f8c770.speaker: Homey Wanderer

bark_611e6056947dbec7.text: Don't kill me! I only cook for the freaks!
bark_611e6056947dbec7.speaker: Cook

bark_5f209015ff9fb940.text: This door must have locked when you let us in.
bark_5f209015ff9fb940.speaker: Narrator

bark_ebe734bab56f58bc.text: You're not supposed to be here!
bark_ebe734bab56f58bc.speaker: Unknown

bark_21349182e5208592.text: Hey! Get me out of here!
bark_21349182e5208592.speaker: Marie-Louise

bark_02174377bebf3a49.text: Fall back to the elevated one!
bark_02174377bebf3a49.speaker: Brotherhood Gunner

bark_a52247ac4251c55d.text: My normal attacks have been removed.
bark_a52247ac4251c55d.speaker: Jessica Watts
